outlook_paragraph: Diamondback Energy shows solid drilling activity with 19 active sites at decision date, 5.2% above recent trends, driven by two newly active pads alongside sustained operations on 17 continuous ones. This upward momentum in the Permian Basin supports a modest production increase into Q4 2021. With full exposure to the basin and realized prices tracking at a 7% discount to WTI, average prices settle around $60.50/boe. The deterministic revenue forecast is set at approximately $1.63 billion, reflecting stable operations and slight volume expansion.
